name: controlflow-codex
description: Portable planning, orchestration, review, and memory workflows adapted from ControlFlow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, review, orchestration, and memory skills for Codex
interface.longDescription: Bring the portable parts of ControlFlow into Codex: phased planning, complexity-aware execution discipline, evidence-backed review, semantic risk checks, failure taxonomy, and memory hygiene.
defaultPrompt: Use ControlFlow for Codex to plan this repository change.
Apply ControlFlow review discipline to this diff.
Help me execute this task in phases with explicit gates.
